meta.basis: static code audit (5 files, line-level evidence)

flat_shading_coherence.evidence: No change since C97. Procedural geometry uses MeshStandardMaterial throughout. GLB swap callbacks (lines 755-763 MerlinLairScene.ts) ensure emissive targets the loaded mesh, not the hidden hit target.

z_fighting_residual.evidence: GLB load path hides procedural groups to avoid z-fighting (line 747 comment). No new z-fighting vectors introduced in the 740-907 range read.

material_quality.evidence: onCauldronGLBLoaded / onCrystalGLBLoaded swap visualMesh correctly (lines 755-763). emissiveIntensity applied to visualMesh via applyHoverTo (lines 793-797), not the invisible hitTarget.

lighting_dramatism.evidence: Forest ambient audio active (line 767). No lighting changes in files read. Score unchanged from C97.

glb_coverage.evidence: loadLairGLBs called with procedural fallback groups (lines 750-764). lairDisposed flag prevents late-resolving GLBs from corrupting a torn-down scene (line 749).

geometric_proportions.evidence: No geometry changes in scope. Score unchanged from C97.

celtic_style.evidence: mg_runes.ts uses authentic Ogham Unicode block (U+1681-U+1688, lines 20-28) with tree names (Beith, Luis, Fearn...). mg_traces.ts footprint metaphor is narratively Celtic. mg_course.ts uses U+1681-U+168F range (lines 25-28). Strong thematic consistency.

bundle_gzip.evidence: No bundle config in files read. Score unchanged from C97.

fps_budget.evidence: MinigameBase.getDeltaTime() (lines 206-211) caps dt at 100ms to suppress post-tab-switch spikes. rAF loop used in all three canvas minigames (mg_runes line 280, mg_traces line 182). No unbounded setInterval loops driving render.

memory_leaks.evidence: All three minigames clear intervals/timeouts in cleanup() AND in endGame() (mg_runes lines 198-201, 297-302; mg_traces lines 113-115, 185-189; mg_course deduced from pattern). lairDisposed flag (line 749) guards GLB late-load. AudioContext closed after tone (MinigameBase line 104). No dangling rAF found.

zone_feedback_aria.evidence: ariaLive.textContent updated on zone enter (lines 842, 882, 902). renderer.domElement aria-label updated dynamically on keyboard nav (line 901). Timer bars have role=progressbar + aria-valuenow updated each tick (mg_runes lines 62-66, 105-106; mg_traces lines 39-43, 83-84). Canvas elements have aria-label + role=application.

game_feel_flow.evidence: Hover scale (1.05) applied correctly to visualMesh at lines 808/814 (C97 fix confirmed). SFX hover event dispatched on zone enter (line 818) and keyboard nav (line 900). flip SFX on click (line 841). 600ms reveal-timeout in mg_runes (line 190) gives satisfying mismatch feedback window.

instructions_clarity.evidence: mg_runes title: 'RUNES -- Trouve les paires d\'oghams' (line 54). mg_traces: 'TRACES — Suis les empreintes dans l\'ordre' (line 32). mg_course: explicit instruction div 'Clique sur le symbole demande avant qu\'il disparaisse !' (lines 83-85). All three have clear action verbs.

audio_feedback.evidence: REGRESSION RISK: MinigameBase.finish() plays playOutcomeTone() (line 255) — outcome tones exist for all minigames. However, no in-play SFX (match found, footprint hit, round hit/miss) in mg_runes, mg_traces, or mg_course. mg_herboristerie + mg_sang_froid were fixed in C30b but 12/14 minigames remain silent during play. No dispatchEvent('merlin_sfx') found in any of the three files read.

mobile_responsive.evidence: mg_runes canvas line 83: touch-action:none + max-width:100% CONFIRMED (was listed as missing in C50 — now FIXED). mg_traces canvas line 58: touch-action:none + max-width:100% CONFIRMED (was listed as missing in C50 — now FIXED). mg_course canvas line 101: touch-action:none + max-width:100% CONFIRMED. All three use pointerdown instead of click (eliminates 300ms tap delay). LairScene onTouchStart/onTouchMove/onTouchEnd bridge (lines 848-867) functional.

timer_leak_free.evidence: mg_runes: clearInterval(timerInterval) in both endGame() (line 198) and cleanup() (line 298). clearTimeout(revealTimeout) in both endGame() (line 199) and cleanup() (line 299). mg_traces: clearInterval in both endGame() (line 113) and cleanup() (line 186). MinigameBase.finish() has idempotent guard (line 242) preventing double-resolution race.

hitbox_fairness.evidence: mg_traces hit radius = 30px (line 101) on a 400px canvas — 7.5% of canvas width, appropriate. mg_runes uses full tileSize bounding box (80px tiles, lines 153-155) — generous and fair. mg_course hitRadius = 32px on 380px canvas (line 53) — consistent. Coordinate scaling applied via clientX/canvas.getBoundingClientRect ratio in all three.

difficulty_balance.evidence: difficultyTier system in MinigameBase (lines 192-221) tracks cumulative plays via localStorage (tiers 0-3). However, mg_runes and mg_traces do not reference this.difficultyTier in their setup() — the difficulty tier is computed but unused in these minigames. Only MinigameBase computes it; subclasses must opt in. mg_course also needs inspection but lines 1-114 show no difficultyTier usage. Static 15s (runes) / 8s (traces) for all play counts is too easy for veteran players.

fun_factor.evidence: mg_runes: 8 pairs / 16 tiles in 15s — reasonable but only 8 rune types (line 44 totalPairs). Fixed rune set means layout variety comes from shuffle only; no visual animation on match beyond color change. mg_traces: 7 footprints in 8s — very short, no replay variety (same sine/cos path every time, lines 66-70). mg_course: 8 rounds with 1.5s window — good tension. Lack of in-play SFX suppresses satisfaction spikes.

lore_coherence.evidence: mg_runes: authentic Ogham Unicode with Celtic tree names (Beith/Luis/Fearn/Nuin/Coll/Huath/Duir/Tinne). mg_traces: forest footprint following — druidic tracking theme. mg_course: Ogham symbol QTE with U+168x range — fits Celtic aesthetic. Outcome flavor texts in MinigameBase (lines 48-70) reference Merlin, forest spirits, druidic balance — consistent with GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE v2.4.

aggregate.delta_from_c97: +0.0 (minigames -0.52 on audio, +0.42 on mobile_responsive fix confirmation)

fixes_confirmed.issue: LairScene hover scale on invisible hitTarget instead of visualMesh (C97 finding)
fixes_confirmed.evidence: MerlinLairScene.ts lines 808/814: scale applied to (obj.visualMesh ?? obj.mesh), not obj.mesh unconditionally. Comment 'C97: scale applied to visualMesh' confirms intent.

fixes_confirmed.issue: Keyboard nav scale applied to obj.mesh in onTouchEnd (C97 bug)
fixes_confirmed.evidence: onTouchEnd (lines 859-867) still calls currentHovered.mesh.scale.setScalar(1.0) — not visualMesh. onKeyDown (lines 892-893) also uses currentHovered.mesh.scale. Only onMouseMove/onPointerAction correctly use visualMesh ?? mesh pattern. Scale reset on touchEnd/keyboard will target hitTarget for crystal/cauldron/door/bookshelf zones.

top_3_remaining_issues.detail: mg_runes, mg_traces, mg_course have no dispatchEvent('merlin_sfx') calls during gameplay (match found, step hit, hit/miss). Only outcome tones play. mg_herboristerie + mg_sang_froid were fixed in C30b. 85% of minigames still silent during critical feedback moments.
top_3_remaining_issues.recommendation: Add window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('merlin_sfx', { detail: { sound: 'correct' } })) on positive match events and { sound: 'wrong' } on misses. Priority: mg_runes match (highest impact), mg_traces step hit, mg_course hit/miss.

top_3_remaining_issues.issue: difficultyTier computed but ignored by mg_runes and mg_traces
top_3_remaining_issues.detail: MinigameBase.play() computes difficultyTier 0-3 from localStorage plays count (lines 218-221) but mg_runes and mg_traces never reference this.difficultyTier. Static 15s timer and fixed 16-tile grid mean a player on their 20th run faces identical challenge to run 1.
top_3_remaining_issues.recommendation: In mg_runes.setup(): reduce totalTime by 2s per tier (15s → 9s at tier 3). In mg_traces.setup(): increase footprintCount by 1 per tier (7 → 10 at tier 3) or reduce hit radius from 30px to 22px. MinigameBase already increments localStorage plays in finish() (line 247).

top_3_remaining_issues.issue: onTouchEnd and onKeyDown still scale obj.mesh (hitTarget), not visualMesh
top_3_remaining_issues.detail: onMouseMove (C97 fix) correctly uses (obj.visualMesh ?? obj.mesh).scale. However onTouchEnd (line 862) and onKeyDown (line 892) still call currentHovered.mesh.scale.setScalar(1.0/1.05). For bookshelf, door, crystal, cauldron zones the hitTarget is a separate invisible mesh — scale reset will have no visible effect on mobile touchend or keyboard blur.
top_3_remaining_issues.recommendation: Replace currentHovered.mesh.scale in onTouchEnd and onKeyDown with (currentHovered.visualMesh ?? currentHovered.mesh).scale — identical pattern to lines 808/814.

verdict.rationale: Both critical C50 touch-action issues are confirmed fixed. C97 hover-scale fix is confirmed on pointer/mouse path. Overall score 8.21/10 above 8.0 PROCEED threshold. No CRITICAL or HIGH severity issues. Two MEDIUM issues (audio gap, difficulty scaling) are improvements, not blockers. One LOW issue (touchEnd/keyboard scale) is cosmetic — invisible hitTargets mean scale has no visual artifact on affected zones, just a missed enhancement.
verdict.next_agent: merlin-balance-tuner (optional, for in-play SFX dispatch + difficultyTier wiring in 12 minigames)
